description: This quiet complex features only 20 unique townhomes nestled in the Rosemary Heights neighbourhood, offering a sense of family and warmth. This originally owned townhome features the main floor with an open-concept, bright chef’s kitchen with upgraded appliances, quartz counter tops. a cozy balcony off the kitchen overlooks a backyard onto peaceful single-family houses. Upstairs features three generously sized bedrooms. The master bedroom includes a large walk-in closet and a spa-like ensuite. The bottom floor offers a sunny, versatile flex room that opens up to the large backyard. The property includes a Double Garage with two additional spots on the private driveway and a fully fenced yard - perfect for your pets. An unbeatable location in South Surrey near schools, shopping & transit.
